sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Launa namkim omna mualkuam thuk sung ahi zong,
Lungnuam a ka omna ni tang khuavak sung
hizong;
Khuasia khuapha taleh, thuhoih khat ken thei ing,
Jesuh tawh ton peuh leng, koima peuh pai
ning.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Jesuh tawh ton leng mun khempeuh ka pai ding,
Ama omna peuh vantung hipah
ding, kei ka om ding;
A singlamteh ke’n ka pua ding, ka hampha ding
Jesuh tawh ton leng, mun
khempeuh ka pai ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sehnel nisa kanin mawhna, gal le sa lakah,
Nuntak thupha puakin
ka pai ding phamawh hi-a;
Ka mel bangbang pua-in tua munah ka pai ding,
Jesuh tawh ton peuh leng
koima peuh pai ning.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Midangte’n tuipi gal kanin a sep laitakin,
Kei puak ding
singlamteh tual sung teng ahi zongin;
A thupiakna mangin upna kipin om ning,
Kei hong ompihna koi
ma peuhah om ning.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka Topa’ thupiakna ke’n ka nial ding hilo hi,
Hong
hilhna kammalte ke’n ka zuih ding hizaw hi;
Inn ah omzaw ding maw khual gamla paizaw
ding,
Honpa tawh hi peuh leng koi peuh lungkim ing.
